title: centrosema plumieri
intro: Centrosema plumieri, also known as tick trefoil or goat's head, is a species of legume that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centrosema plumieri include its potential to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and laxative. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
